title: Department Manager Vacancy at Nippon Paint Store - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Nippon Paint Store - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Nippon Paint Store are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nippon Paint Store:
Nippon Paint Store is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nippon Paint Store!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
